mapper.select: SELECT v.vehicle_id, v.user_id, v.household_id, v.license_plate, v.car_model, v.car_type, v.status, v.approved_by, v.approved_at, v.created_at, u.name AS user_name FROM vehicle v LEFT JOIN user u ON v.user_id = u.user_id WHERE v.user_id = #{userId} AND v.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY v.created_at DESC

SELECT v.vehicle_id, v.user_id, v.household_id, v.license_plate, v.car_model, v.car_type, v.status, v.approved_by, v.approved_at, v.created_at, h.dong, h.ho, u.name AS user_name FROM vehicle v LEFT JOIN household h ON v.household_id = h.household_id LEFT JOIN user u ON v.user_id = u.user_id WHERE v.vehicle_id = #{vehicleId} AND v.deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT DISTINCT dong FROM household WHERE dong IS NOT NULL ORDER BY dong
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM vehicle WHERE household_id = #{householdId} AND status != 'REJECTED' AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM vehicle WHERE license_plate = #{licensePlate} AND status IN ('APPROVED', 'PENDING') AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT vehicle_id FROM vehicle WHERE license_plate = #{licensePlate} AND status = 'APPROVED' AND deleted_at IS NULL LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO vehicle (user_id, household_id, license_plate, car_model, car_type, status, created_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{householdId}, #{licensePlate}, #{carModel}, #{carType}, #{status}, NOW())
mapper.update:
UPDATE vehicle
license_plate = #{licensePlate}, car_model = #{carModel},
WHERE vehicle_id = #{vehicleId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE vehicle SET deleted_at = NOW() WHERE vehicle_id = #{vehicleId}
UPDATE vehicle SET status = 'APPROVED', approved_by = #{approvedBy}, approved_at = NOW() WHERE vehicle_id = #{vehicleId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE vehicle SET status = 'REJECTED', deleted_at = NOW() WHERE vehicle_id = #{vehicleId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT pl.log_id, pl.vehicle_id, v.license_plate, pl.entry_type, pl.logged_at FROM parking_log pl JOIN vehicle v ON pl.vehicle_id = v.vehicle_id WHERE v.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY pl.logged_at DESC
